'''Lolnar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Flashpoint" /> located in the [[Lolnar system/Legends|Lolnar system]], in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] that was known as the [[Arrowhead]]. It was situated on the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]], between the [[Perma system/Legends|Perma]] and [[Rehemsa system/Legends|Rehemsa systems]].<ref name="TEA" /> The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lesan Ramier]], who was a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from Lolnar.<ref name="Flashpoint" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lolnar was first mentioned in ''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]'', a [[1995]] supplement written by [[Sterling Hershey]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Flashpoint" /> ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', a reference book written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Jason Fry]] and released in [[2009]], placed the Lolnar [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Lolnar itself, in grid square M-11.<ref name="TEA" />
